# Love of Tales

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **0** · Lore

*Condition.*

---

Attach to a (Lore) hero. Limit 1 per hero.
**Response:** After a **_Song_** card is played, exhaust Love of Tales to add 1 resource to attached hero's resource pool.
